smoke.detail: pixi run pytest endpoints/clearance/test_aggregate.py -q -> 14 passed in 0.09s (core env, laptop; no box/GPU).

note: DECOMPOSED clearance aggregator: renal/hepatic/aggregate as three separate labeled reads with distinct unit strings; no code path averages or sums across units (F-3); PKSmart CL is ranking-only and always surfaced with its fold-error; ADMET-AI clearance candidates flagged low-weight (F-17); AD/calibration and Watanabe CLr live-unit (F-14) left DEFERRED.
